text.title: agile-ba-frameworks Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for agile-ba-frameworks as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Treating ceremony coverage as principle adherence — "we run stand-ups therefore we Stimulate Collaboration."
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Ceremonies are necessary but not sufficient; principle adherence requires evidence of behaviour change, not attendance records.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Disciplined Agile has ~24 process goals; agents under context pressure invent plausible-sounding extras. Force the agent to enumerate from a vetted list — fail closed if it can't.

failure-mode.description: BABOK v3 quoted into agile contexts verbatim.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Knowledge-area definitions are waterfall-tinted; quoting them as agile guidance misleads. Always cross-reference with the Agile Extension first.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Models hand back "Principle 4: 4/5" with no quote. Reject any score row missing a quoted source line.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents pattern-match on "agile + scaling" → SAFe regardless of fit. Add a guard: "if team < 50 people, do not propose SAFe."

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: When given 6 lifecycle options the agent picks "all of them apply" — useless. Force a single primary + at most one alternative.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Agents reproduce 2017 competency wording in 2025 contexts. Pin the AAC version in system prompt or grading is dated.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Anthropic-trained models lean toward Atlassian / SAFe content (over-represented online). When asked about DA or IIBA, output is thinner — boost via explicit reference packs.

failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Constitution is the single source of truth; agent must propose diffs, never write directly. Always review-then-merge.

failure-mode.description: Citation of paywalled IIBA / PMI content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Some agents quote BABOK passages verbatim. License risk. Restrict to summary + URL; never inline long quotes.

failure-mode.description: Confusing Disciplined Agile (PMI) with Disciplined Agile Delivery (Scott Ambler, pre-2019).
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Different scope, different vocabulary. Pin the post-2019 PMI version unless explicitly using the legacy material.
